title: The Lily
content:
The modest Rose puts forth a thorn,
    The humble sheep a threat'ning horn:
    While the Lily white shall in love delight,
    Nor a thorn nor a threat stain her beauty bright.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Blake delivers a powerful performance in "The Lily"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
